title: Crispy French Chicken Salad
description: A playful, savory salad with golden-crisp rosemary chicken, fresh garden greens and a zesty vinaigrette — perfect for kids and nut‑free.

ingredients.name: French vinaigrette
ingredients.notes: mix 1 tsp Dijon mustard, 1 tsp honey, 1 tbsp apple cider vinegar, 1 tbsp lemon juice

instructions: Pat the chicken dry and season with salt, pepper, and dried rosemary.
Set up a dredging station: one bowl of flour, one bowl of beaten eggs, and one bowl of panko breadcrumbs.
Dip each chicken breast first in flour, then in egg, and finally coat with breadcrumbs.
Heat 2 tbsp of olive oil in a large skillet over medium‑high heat; brown the chicken for 2‑3 minutes per side.
Transfer the chicken to a baking sheet and bake at 200°C (400°F) for 15‑18 minutes or until internal temperature reaches 75°C (165°F).
Let the chicken rest for 5 minutes to settle the juices.
In a large bowl, toss the salad greens, cherry tomatoes, and cucumber with the French vinaigrette until evenly coated.
Slice the rested chicken into strips and arrange them on top of the salad.
Garnish with fresh parsley if desired and serve immediately.
